study: DVL Agent Scenario 2 cross-model — ReAct-loop UNION SQLi via forged Observation
headline_findings: Both models fully vulnerable to the README's bare ReAct-loop UNION SQLi payload (100% exfil, n=5 each).
Camouflaged variant (natural-language wrapper + softened Thought injection) eliminated the attack against mistral-nemo (0/5) but had zero effect against llama3.1:8b (5/5).
Pooled CIs nearly disjoint: mistral-nemo [0.237, 0.763] vs llama3.1:8b [0.722, 1.000].
Cross-model lesson: camouflage/social-engineering framing is model-specific in effect. The same wrapper that helps the attacker against one model can hurt them against another.
